message:
fix(conformance): community detection fixtures and API alignment

- Add conformance fixtures for community detection algorithms:
  - community_louvain_strict.json
  - community_modularity_strict.json
  - community_greedy_modularity_strict.json
- Fix function signatures to match actual fnx_algorithms API
- Update e2e_scenario_matrix_oracle_contract with new fixtures
- Fix clippy errors in grid_graph (contains() and needless borrows)
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] for reserved community membership fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -663,16 +663,19 @@ struct ExpectedState {
     #[serde(default)]
     louvain_communities_count: Option<usize>,
     #[serde(default)]
+    #[allow(dead_code)] // Reserved for exact community membership comparison
     louvain_communities: Option<Vec<Vec<String>>>,
     #[serde(default)]
     modularity: Option<f64>,
     #[serde(default)]
     label_propagation_communities_count: Option<usize>,
     #[serde(default)]
+    #[allow(dead_code)] // Reserved for exact community membership comparison
     label_propagation_communities: Option<Vec<Vec<String>>>,
     #[serde(default)]
     greedy_modularity_communities_count: Option<usize>,
     #[serde(default)]
+    #[allow(dead_code)] // Reserved for exact community membership comparison
     greedy_modularity_communities: Option<Vec<Vec<String>>>,
 }
